name: Axolotl
conservationEfforts: Xochimilco canal restoration in Mexico City. Captive population of millions worldwide (popular in research and pet trade). Chinampa (floating garden) restoration provides habitat.
description: Famous for its ability to regenerate limbs, the axolotl is a permanently aquatic salamander that retains its larval features throughout life. Despite being abundant in captivity, it is nearly extinct in its only wild habitat — Lake Xochimilco.
